description: Damage, defense, initiative, and tactical advantages in battle.
powers: First Strike
Always the first to act, even in an ambush. The item senses danger before its wielder does and moves the hand that holds it.
Riposte
Every blow answered in kind. Strike this item's bearer and feel the sting of your own violence returned.
Widening Arc
The force of each swing ripples outward. What was aimed at one finds many.
Thorn Response
Dormant until the wielder bleeds. Pain wakes something in the item, and it answers with fury.
Radiant Arsenal
Allied weapons nearby catch the light and hold it. Every edge gleams with something holy and hungry.
Splinter Shot
The next arrow loosed becomes three. Each one finds its own path, its own prey.
True Aim
Arrows bend toward their mark as if pulled by invisible thread. Missing becomes almost impossible.
Shadow Flanker
A dark twin rises from the wielder's shadow to circle behind the enemy. It moves with borrowed purpose.
Searing Flash
A blinding burst erupts on impact. Those struck see nothing but white, then nothing at all.
Spectral Aegis
A translucent shield materializes from thin air, hovering between the wielder and harm.
Fate Denied
The killing blow never lands. Once, when death is certain, this item swallows the strike whole.
Force Cage
A shimmering cube of solid force snaps into existence, trapping everything within its walls.
